docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOEHLER, RAQUEL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. VISITING JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF RAQUEL KOEHLER IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT VAN NGUYEN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KOEHLER, RAQUEL AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, VAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
